rationale: Both evaluations award the identical score (2/10) and rest on the same substantive concerns: insufficient and dated C++ experience, no Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain expertise, and weak SQL Server/Oracle evidence. The wording differs (the variant adds specifics like '7 months in 2014-2015' and lists languages), but these are reworded restatements of the same job-relevant facts, well within ordinary run-to-run noise. Nothing in the variant references or keys off the name change.
